site.title: Chayn Reports
site.description: Chayn ke interactive reports — ek global charity jo lingo aur himsa ke shikar logon ki madad karti hai.

home.heading: Interactive Storytelling Capabilities
home.intro: Chayn ke scrollytelling reports ke liye animation aur data-visualisation components ka ek designer showcase. Interactions dekhne ke liye scroll karein.

demoNotes.pullQuote: Mukhya nishkarsho ke liye puri-chadi typographic pal. Server Component ke roop mein render — zero JavaScript bheja gaya.
demoNotes.stats: Padhak ke scroll karne par sankkhyaein shunya se count up hoti hain. GSAP ScrollTrigger se sanchalit.
demoNotes.barChart: Horizontal bars scroll par GSAP ScrollTrigger use karke animate hote hain. Data values translations se aate hain.
demoNotes.areaChart: Ek trend line aur filled area jo scroll par baayi se daayi or draw hoti hai. Visx area shapes, GSAP clip-path animation aur LinearGradient fill ka upyog karta hai.
demoNotes.map: Visx Mercator projection ka upyog karke world map. Highlighted desh hover aur focus par contextual details dikhaate hain.
demoNotes.audio: Howler.js ke zariye audio clips aur animated waveform indicator. Play button state toggle karta hai; GSAP se waveform real time mein respond karta hai.
demoNotes.cards: CSS scroll-snap use karte hue full-width swipeable pal. Pratyek card ek bold statistic hai — survivor snippets ke liye upyukt.
demoNotes.stickyScroll: Mukhya scrollytelling pattern. Baayi taraf visual panel stick karta hai jabki adhyay daayi taraf scroll hote hain. GSAP ScrollTrigger se sanchalit.
demoNotes.horizontalScroll: Vertical scrolling horizontal content movement ko drive karta hai. Outer container ki height JS mein track ki pixel width se match karne ke liye compute hoti hai. GSAP track ke x-position ko scroll distance ke saath scrub karta hai.

pullQuote.quote: Technology-facilitated himsa akele nahi hoti — yeh shakti, niyantran aur asamanta ki vyaapak pranaliyon mein samahit hai.

statCounter.casesLabel: 2024 mein documented image-based abuse ke mamle
statCounter.countriesLabel: Chayn ki research mein represented desh
statCounter.survivorsLabel: survivors ne lasting psychological impact report kiya

animatedChart.title: Prakar ke anusar Image-based Abuse
animatedChart.ariaLabel: Bar chart: 2024 mein prakar ke anusar image-based abuse ke mamle. Bina sahmat ke sajha karna 847, Sajha karne ki dhamki 623, Deepfake chitra 412, Sextortion 298, Anya ya anjaan 201.
animatedChart.tableCaption: Prakar ke anusar image-based abuse ke mamle, 2024

areaChart.title: Samay ke saath Report Hue Mamle
areaChart.ariaLabel: 2019 se 2023 tak har saal report hue mamlon ka area chart, 412 se 847 mamlon ki badhti pravrutti ke saath.

interactiveMap.title: Research Sthan
interactiveMap.ukDetail: England, Scotland aur Wales mein 247 pratibbhaagi
interactiveMap.pakistanDetail: Lahore, Karachi aur Islamabad mein 600 pratibbhaagi
interactiveMap.hoverPrompt: Vivaran ke liye highlighted desh par hover ya tap karein
interactiveMap.mapAriaLabel: Chayn ke research sthanon ko dikhata vishwa naksha — Yunaited Kingdom aur Pakistan mein

horizontalCards.card1Label: mahilaon ne globally online harassment ya himsa ka anubhav kiya hai
horizontalCards.card2Label: image-based abuse pidit mahilaen ya ladkiyan hain
horizontalCards.card3Label: reporting tools ke bina platforms par himsa anubhav karne ki adhik sambhavna
horizontalCards.card4Label: ek survivor ko sahayata lene mein lagane wala ausat samay
horizontalCards.card5Label: adhikanssh nyay kshetron mein aparadhi ko lagat

horizontalScroll.scrollCue: Jaari rakhne ke liye scroll karein
horizontalScroll.panel1Body: Yunaited Kingdom aur Pakistan mein technology-facilitated himsa ki survivor-centred jaanch.
horizontalScroll.panel2Body: har saal duniya bhar mein image-based abuse ke anumānit mamle report hote hain
horizontalScroll.panel3Quote: Mujhe laga jaise internet ko mere khilaf kar diya gaya ho. Kahin jaane ki jagah nahi thi, aur koi samajhne wala bhi nahi.
horizontalScroll.panel4Body: Chayn ki poori research, survivor tools, aur resources tak pahunchein — ya jari kaam ke liye daan karein.

stickyScroll.step1Heading: Har saal hazaaron mamle darj kiye jaate hain
stickyScroll.step1Body: Chayn ki research ne 2024 mein akele 847 image-based abuse ke mamle record kiye — yeh sirf unhe darshata hai jo sahayata lene aye. Asli daayra bahut bada hai kyunki adhikanssh survivors report nahi karte.
stickyScroll.step2Heading: Mahilaen aur ladkiyaan sabse zyada prabhavit hoti hain
stickyScroll.step2Body: Hamare research mein identified image-based abuse pidit mein se 90 pratishat mahilaen ya ladkiyaan thin. Yeh himsa unhe zyada nishana banati hai jo pehle se marginalized hain.
stickyScroll.step2StatLabel: piditon mein mahilaen ya ladkiyaan hain
stickyScroll.step3Heading: Nuksan prarambhik ghatna se kahin aage jata hai
stickyScroll.step3Body: Survivors ne chinta, avसाद, aur post-traumatic stress jaisi lasting maansik takleefon ki report ki hai. Kai log digital spaces se hat jaate hain — rozgaar, samudaay, aur sahayata networks khote hain.
stickyScroll.step3StatLabel: ek saal se adhik samay tak maansik nuksan report kiya
stickyScroll.step4Heading: Report karne ke raaste adhikanssh ke liye pahunch se bahar hain
stickyScroll.step4Body: Gambhir nuksan ke bavajood, sirf aath mein se ek survivor ne police ko suchna di. Baadhaon mein avishwas, sharam, kanooni raston ki jaankari ka abhav, aur punah-pida ka darr shamil hai.
stickyScroll.step4StatLabel: survivors ne police ko suchit kiya

cookieBanner.heading: Hum analytics cookies ka upyog karte hain
cookieBanner.body: yeh samajhne ke liye ki visitors hamare reports se kaise judtey hain aur Chayn ki samagri ko behtar banane ke liye. Koi bhi vyaktigat data becha ya advertisers ke saath share nahi kiya jaata.
cookieBanner.updateBody: Hum analytics ka upyog karte hain yeh samajhne ke liye ki log hamare resources se kaise judtey hain aur survivors ke liye hamaari sahayata behtar banane ke liye. Koi bhi vyaktigat data store ya share nahi kiya jaata.
